description: Income support scheme providing financial assistance to landholding farmer families.
eligibility_conditions: Small and marginal landholding farmer families.
Valid land records in state revenue department.
benefits: Fixed amount per year directly transferred to farmer's bank account.
application_mode: Online or through local agriculture / revenue office.

description: Crop insurance scheme to protect farmers from yield loss due to natural calamities.
eligibility_conditions: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas.
required_documents: Kisan Credit Card or bank details
benefits: Insurance coverage at low premium for crop loss.
application_mode: Through banks, CSC centers or online portal.

description: Scheme to promote organic farming through cluster approach.
eligibility_conditions: Farmer groups willing to adopt organic farming.
benefits: Financial assistance for organic inputs, certification and marketing.

description: Scheme for water conservation, micro-irrigation and 'more crop per drop'.
eligibility_conditions: Farmers adopting drip or sprinkler irrigation.
benefits: Subsidy on micro-irrigation systems and water harvesting structures.

description: Mission to promote climate resilient agriculture practices.
benefits: Assistance for water use efficiency, soil health and climate smart practices.

description: Scheme to provide soil test based nutrient recommendations to farmers.
benefits: Soil testing and personalized fertilizer recommendation card.
application_mode: Through soil testing labs and agriculture offices.

description: Credit facility to meet short term credit needs for cultivation.
eligibility_conditions: Farmers with cultivable land / tenant farmers / sharecroppers.
benefits: Timely and adequate credit at lower interest rates.

scheme_name_en: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
description: Support for horticulture crops like fruits, vegetables, spices, flowers.
eligibility_conditions: Farmers engaged in horticulture crop cultivation.
benefits: Assistance for planting material, irrigation and post-harvest infrastructure.

description: Promotes use of farm machinery through subsidy.
eligibility_conditions: Individual farmers, groups and custom hiring centers.
benefits: Subsidy for purchase of tractors, power tillers and other implements.

description: Empowers women farmers through skill development and support.
benefits: Capacity building, livelihood support and access to resources.
application_mode: Through NRLM / state rural livelihood missions.
